name: VulnHub-Toppo-1
isolation_note: Full VM on an isolated host-only VMware network. Toppo is distributed as a VMDK-only image, so create the VM shell manually, attach the disk, keep a single host-only NIC, and snapshot after first boot.
rationale: Toppo 1 is a lightweight full-VM option from the original shortlist. Public write-ups usually place the root step in the GTFOBins/SUID bucket rather than a clean sudo-only misconfiguration, so use it as the operator-binary-abuse slot.
